description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with steel round case with branding on the bezel Dial style: Black dial with silver handsStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Brand logo on the 12 hour mark Water resistant 50 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 7 mm
